source: Curated from JobsDB HK, CTgoodjobs, Glassdoor HK, LinkedIn HK, and employer listings from HK-based digital agencies, SHOPLINE, and e-commerce platforms (2025-2026)

roles.growthOutlook: HK digital ad spend growing steadily. Strong demand for performance marketing and social media skills across all industries. E-commerce growth creating more digital marketing roles. HK is a regional marketing hub for APAC.

requiredSkills.description: Plan, execute, and optimize paid search and social media campaigns. Manage budgets, bid strategies, and audience targeting. Core performance marketing skill.
Track website traffic, analyze user behavior, create conversion funnels, and report on campaign ROI.
On-page and off-page search engine optimization. Keyword research, content optimization, and technical SEO best practices.
Create and schedule content across Instagram, Facebook, LinkedIn, and Xiaohongshu (Little Red Book) for HK audiences. Community engagement and social listening.
Create social media graphics, short-form videos, and visual assets for digital campaigns. Basic design skills increasingly expected.
Build email campaigns, segment audiences, A/B test subject lines, and track open/click-through rates using Mailchimp or HubSpot.
Design and analyze A/B tests for landing pages, ad creative, and email campaigns. Conversion rate optimization fundamentals.
Build campaign performance reports, analyze marketing data, and create budget tracking spreadsheets.
Write compelling ad copy, social media posts, and marketing content in Chinese (Traditional Chinese for HK market). Understanding of HK-specific tone and cultural references.
Required for international brand communication, English-language campaigns, and working in multinational marketing teams.
Essential for local HK marketing campaigns, understanding local consumer behavior, and creating culturally relevant content.

roles.growthOutlook: Growing demand in HK tech ecosystem. Virtual banks, fintech startups, and e-commerce platforms all hiring PMs. Increasing number of Associate Product Manager (APM) graduate programmes at larger tech companies.

requiredSkills.description: Define product vision, prioritize features, create product roadmaps, and align stakeholders around product direction.
Conduct user interviews, analyze user behavior, create user personas, and translate user needs into product requirements.
Write user stories, manage product backlogs, participate in sprint planning, and work closely with engineering teams in agile environments.
Define KPIs, analyze product metrics (DAU/MAU, retention, conversion), and make data-driven product decisions. SQL basics for querying product data.
Create wireframes and low-fidelity prototypes to communicate product concepts. Figma is the industry standard.
Design experiments to validate product hypotheses. Understanding of statistical significance and experiment design.
Bridge business, engineering, and design teams. Present product plans to leadership and manage cross-functional expectations.
Research competitor products, identify market opportunities, and inform product positioning and differentiation strategy.
Essential for technical documentation, product specs, and communication in international product teams.
Important for products targeting HK or Greater China markets. User research and stakeholder communication in local language.

roles.growthOutlook: HK e-commerce market growing rapidly, accelerated by cross-border e-commerce with mainland China. Platforms like Shopline, Shopify, HKTVmall, and Taobao HK creating operations roles. Digital-savvy fresh graduates in demand.

requiredSkills.description: Manage product listings, inventory, pricing, and order fulfillment on major e-commerce platforms. Understanding of platform-specific tools and analytics.
Track inventory levels, analyze sales data, create operations reports, and manage SKU databases.

requiredSkills.skillName: Digital Marketing Basics (Google Ads / Social Media)
requiredSkills.description: Coordinate with marketing team on product promotions, understand campaign performance metrics, and optimize product pages for conversion.
Manage stock levels, coordinate with suppliers and warehouses, handle logistics arrangements, and resolve fulfillment issues.
Handle customer inquiries, manage returns and refunds, and maintain customer satisfaction metrics. Use CRM tools like Salesforce or Zendesk.
Analyze e-commerce traffic, track conversion funnels, and report on sales performance metrics.
Make minor updates to product pages, landing pages, and email templates without developer support.
Understanding of HK payment gateways (PayMe, AlipayHK, FPS), cross-border logistics, and customs processes for cross-border e-commerce.
Essential for supplier communication, customer service, and working with local logistics partners in Hong Kong.
Important for cross-border e-commerce operations, communicating with mainland Chinese suppliers and platforms.
Useful for international brand partnerships, platform documentation, and working with global e-commerce tools.
